name: ALT| 🍼 postpartum period
description:
He gave birth to your child, but what next? 🧸ྀི

"When "mistake" calls you mom"

────୨ৎ────

It's been more than a year since your son was born, you're living together again, but is this what a completely happy family looks like?

your son is 1.5 years old

────୨ৎ────

⋆.𐙚 basically create all my bots purely for myself, and this random idea really caught my attention, so if you have any ideas for a script on a similar topic, share it in the comments! ⎚ (I'm also thinking of making versions with Nolan and Yaoshi) ֶָ֢.
